mustKeep: Confirmed business facts and explicit unknowns
No emoji or visible dash characters
mustFix: Make mobile navigation and all calls to action at least 44px tall.
Increase mobile body, caption, disclaimer, and footer text to readable sizes.
Rename “Plan your visit” to “View opening status” while opening details remain unavailable.
Consolidate repeated concept-stage disclaimers into one concise status notice.
Strengthen contrast for the pale visit-card eyebrow and small rust numerals.
preserve: The high-desert oven illustration and arched visual motif.
The cream, clay, rust, and juniper-green palette.
The central botanical trail as the page’s signature device.
The editorial serif headlines and italic hero emphasis.
The transparent handling of unconfirmed business information.
The desktop alternating section composition and AZ seal.
